name: Banana Squares
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mashed ripe bananas (from 2 to 3 Medium bananas)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small mixing bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form; set aside.
2. In a large mixing bowl, cream shortening and sugar. Beat in egg yolks; mix well. Add mashed bananas.
3. Combine flour and baking soda; add to the creamed mixture alternately with sour milk, beating well after each addition. Stir in vanilla.
4. Fold in egg whites. If using, fold in chopped walnuts.
5. Pour batter into a greased 13x9x2-inch baking pan.
6. Bake at 350°F for 45-50 minutes. Cool on a wire rack.
7. Garnish with whipped cream and banana slices if desired.
